judgment.summary: The company exhibits explosive growth and high margins with a very attractive forward valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last reported EPS of 12.20 beat the 9.16 estimate by 33.2%, with the next earnings date scheduled for 2026-06-24.
positives: Forward P/E 7.79 vs trailing 37.38 — suggests significant valuation expansion potential.
PEG ratio 0.26 — indicates the stock is highly undervalued relative to its growth.
Revenue growth 196.3% and earnings growth 756.0% — shows massive year-over-year expansion.
Operating margin 67.6% — reflects highly efficient and profitable operations.
negatives: Mean analyst target $573.90 — is significantly lower than the current spot price of $793.17.
Beta 1.92 — implies high price volatility for traders.
Price/Sales 15.39 — represents a high premium relative to revenue.

news.paragraph: Micron is advancing its product roadmap by sampling high-speed 256GB DDR5 RDIMMs built on 1-Gamma DRAM technology. This development occurs alongside a significant surge in the broader DRAM sector and strong performance from storage peers like Seagate and Western Digital. Options traders should weigh this product innovation and sector-wide momentum when evaluating upcoming volatility.
